content.question: How would current teacher workforce constraints (ageing, shortage-driven transfers, mobility barriers) affect the feasibility of rapid consolidation and staff reallocation in specific high-depopulation regions?
content.reduction_path: Map teacher age distribution, contract status, and transfer history by region and school type (rural vs. urban) using Ministry of Education administrative data; model scenarios of consolidated school staffing needs under different consolidation timelines and assess gap between demand and projected supply by region.
